statement.en: Supervised additive models can decompose and extrapolate single-cell expression aligned with known gene programs
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is a 2026-dated preprint with embargoed full content. Without access to the complete abstract, methodology, or results, the axiomatic claim cannot be independently evaluated. The title proposes a specific capability (decomposition and extrapolation of single-cell expression via supervised additive models), but validation requires access to the full thesis. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional status pending embargo lift and peer validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 遺伝子プログラムの言語で個々の細胞の声が重ね合わされている。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 既知の遺伝子プログラムという光源から、個々の細胞の発現が放射状に分解・再構成される。
